company_profile.name: wellConnected
company_profile.product: allco — the first centralized social care platform built to streamline workflow processes for CBOs (Community-Based Organizations)
company_profile.mission: Collaborative community care, all in one place
company_profile.mission_detail: allco is a HIPAA-compliant data-sharing platform built by wellConnected that connects healthcare organizations and community-based organizations (CBOs) so patients can be referred for services (e.g. food pantries, housing, mental health) and have their data follow them between providers without re-entering it. allco focuses on closed-loop referrals, cross-organization collaboration, and social determinants of health (SDOH) outcomes for underserved communities.
company_profile.core_problem: Fragmentation — separate organizations working off disconnected, isolated systems instead of shared connected data
company_profile.primary_users: Organization Admins at CBOs, nonprofits, and hospitals — not individual consumers
key_functionality: Community member identity reconciliation across agencies (MPI)
company_profile.geographic_focus: New York (governing law), Western New York, Buffalo
values: Meeting people where the existing system already is (e.g. integrating with 211 rather than replacing it)
Formal accountability to nonprofit/CBO sector compliance structures (501(c)(3), tax status tracking)
priority_themes: Data sharing between healthcare and social service organizations
